name: Dirt Cups (Jello Pudding)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour milk into a large bowl.
2. Add the Jello pudding mix to the milk in the bowl.
3. Beat the mixture with a whisk for 1 to 2 minutes.
4. Let the mixture stand for 5 minutes.
5. Stir in the Cool Whip topping and half of the crushed chocolate cookies.
6. Place 1 tablespoon (tbsp) of crushed cookies into each plastic cup.
7. Fill the cups about 3/4 full with the pudding mixture.
8. Top the remaining cookies on top.
Per serving: calories
